@dev Modifier to gate transfers by agent trust score and revocation status
 @param agent The agent's wallet address

@notice Verify an agent's passport (owner only)
 @param tokenId The passport token ID to verify

@notice Revoke an agent's passport (owner only)
 @param tokenId The passport token ID to revoke

@notice Add an authorized reporter
 @param reporter Address to authorize

@notice Remove an authorized reporter
 @param reporter Address to deauthorize
